channel.title: GitHub Batchfile Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Batchfile in GitHub

item.title: lstprjct/IDM-Activation-Script
item.description: IDM Activation & Trail Reset Script

item.title: WindowsAddict/IDM-Activation-Script
item.description: An open source tool to activate and reset trial of Internet Download Manager

item.title: TheMMC/In-Place_Upgrade_Helper
item.description: Helper-Tool for Windows 10/11 In-Place-upgrades and changing between Windows Editions

item.title: enhorse/java-interview
item.description: Вопросы и ответы к интервью Java разработчика

item.title: mon5termatt/medicat_installer
item.description: Medicat Installer Repo

item.title: Whitecat18/Windows-Activator
item.description: Activate your windows machines in one step.

item.description: IDM激活脚本汉化版

item.title: Zuntan03/EasySdxlWebUi
item.description: Animagine や Pony を Stable Diffusion web UI と forge で簡単に使えるようにします。

item.title: Octanium91/NFS_Heat_CPU_Load_FIX
item.description: Need for Speed Heat, CPU 90-100% load fix (script, windows)

item.description: Work in progress Wiki for modding Monster Hunter Rise.

item.description: Ativador Office 365

item.title: ancel1x/Ancels-Performance-Batch
item.description: Open Source Tweaker made to improve system performance and lower system latency.

item.title: saranrajmcse/WIN10RDP
item.description: create a Windows 10 RDP with ngrok

item.title: ionuttbara/windows-defender-remover
item.description: A tool which is uses to remove Windows Defender in Windows 8.x, Windows 10 (every version) and Windows 11.

item.title: CesiumGS/3d-tiles
item.description: Specification for streaming massive heterogeneous 3D geospatial datasets 🌎

item.title: DiligentGraphics/DiligentEngine
item.description: A modern cross-platform low-level graphics library and rendering framework

item.title: ntdevlabs/tiny11builder
item.description: Scripts to build a trimmed-down Windows 11 image.

item.title: vishnu1001/office-2021
item.description: Microsoft Office 2021 Activator 🤫

item.title: abbodi1406/KMS_VL_ALL_AIO
item.description: Smart Activation Script

item.title: kkkgo/LTSC-Add-MicrosoftStore
item.description: Add Windows Store for LTSC

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: A Windows and Office activator using HWID / Ohook / KMS38 / Online KMS activation methods, with a focus on open-source code and fewer antivirus detections.

item.title: shuhongfan/NavicatCracker
item.description: navicat 激活 Navicat所有版本破解 A keygen for Navicat 16 Navicat16破解 Navicat Keygen Navicat 16 Keygen注册机(NavicatCracker) Navicat 16 破解 Navicat Premium 16 破解 Navicat破解 绿色版 MySQL
